reviews.review_description: I played that game for months straight and every update ether helped me or didn’t but I never stopped playing every player I met I could chat with and move together like he was really there sometimes people were mean and would steal from me but the next day I was ready for there Halloween event I would loose alll my items on rebirth but I could still work my way back up. Every time I saw one of the best rarity brainrot or some character  form a show I loved I would go crazy trying to get it would forget about everything else but if I did not get it I would congratulate the person who did. To those who have given this game a 1 star review because they could not join it’s not the games fault they took the game down so there is no more updates so you can’t join the game.

reviews.review_title: Pretty good game, but I have some issues
reviews.review_description: When I first saw this game I was SO EXCITED to test it out, especially because of the Pokémon and Gorilla Tag combined together concept. Now that the game has released I know they still have the Pokémon feature but the game revolves around BRAINROT now. Yes you heard me right, BRAINROT. Steal a Brainrot will die out pretty soon and I don’t want this game to die as well.

developer_response.body:
Yo dude, the new update is live with more features and fixes. 

Log in to claim your Rooftop Gosty Warden. 

We will add more pokemon like feature back quickly.

If you’re enjoying it now, please consider updating your rating—thanks!

reviews.review_title: I Love Stealing From Little Kids
reviews.review_description: I installed this game, started playing, and second lobby in, i met a really nice guy that gave me good stuff and let me rebirth a bunch right away. I then searched in publics for lucky blocks. Ended up with seven of them and a golden mythic one i stole from a kid. Bought admin commands... Yeah... It didnt go to well for ANYONE in the server. Stole more stuff, rebirthed, stole more stuff, rebirthed, stole more stuff, rebirthed. W game tho and thx so much for updating the game constantly. So worth the $0.00 and admin commands are worth the $10.00 for sure. Not too OP but just the right amount of OPness. GET THIS GAME NOW.
